{"step_by_step_thinking": "Based on the provided documents, the cells that proliferate from top to bottom of the villi are described in the context of the intestinal crypts and villi. Document [1] and Document [2] mention that stem cells within the crypts give rise to different cell types, including enterocytes, goblet, Paneth, and enteroendocrine cells. Document [30] and Document [31] specifically discuss the renewal and proliferation of goblet cells from the crypt base. Therefore, the cells that proliferate from top to bottom of the villi are goblet cells.", "answer_choice": "B"}
